title: Effect Tooltips
description: Adds hover tooltips to the status effects region of the player inventory screen.
body:
This mod adds a tooltip to status effects displayed in the player inventory. The tooltip contains useful information about the effect such as the name of the mod that added it to the game. The mod also provides an event based API that allows other mods to add new tooltip entries or modify the tooltip in other ways. ![preview image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/390/339/preview.png) ## Provided Information - The name of the effect. - The level/amplifier of the effect. - The remaining duration of the effect. - The name of the mod that added the effect. - The registry ID of the effect (Only when f3+H debug mode is enabled)
